messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0009",
  "title": "中国移动游戏市场收入集中度",
  "page_index": 5,
  "page_range": "5"
}

Section text:
## 中国移动游戏市场收入集中度

message.content: This section addresses the revenue concentration within China's mobile game market. It is structured to answer retrieval queries regarding the topic of market share distribution and industry consolidation, focusing on the entity of the Chinese mobile gaming sector and its leading publishers. While the heading implies analysis of financial dominance and competitive landscape metrics (e.g., CR3/CR5/CR10 ratios or top companies' revenue shares), the provided text contains only the section title. Consequently, no specific dates, definitions, procedures, numerical claims, tables, figures, or evidence types are present. Queries targeting this section should focus on how mobile gaming revenue is distributed among publishers in China, the degree of market concentration, and which companies dominate the sector's financial landscape.
